title: Tetrion Fluorescent Yellow Spray Paint for Wood, Metal, Ceramic & Plastic - Indoor & Outdoor Use, Vivid Colours, Easy Application 400 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
EXCEPTIONAL VERSATILITY: Our fluorescent spray paint is perfect for wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic, providing a vibrant, eye-catching finish every time for a variety of surfaces.
DURABLE INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: Ideal for both interior and exterior projects, it delivers long-lasting, durable results that withstand the elements while keeping colors vibrant indoors.
EFFORTLESS & SMOOTH APPLICATION: Designed for ease of use, ensuring smooth, even coverage, making it perfect for beginners and allowing anyone to achieve professional results with minimal effort.
WIDE RANGE OF VIVID COLOURS: Available in a stunning range of fluorescent shades, this spray paint enhances projects with bright, vivid hues, making them truly stand out and catch the eye.
USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Its user-friendly design and applicability to many surfaces make it an ideal choice for creative projects, offering professional-quality results simply and efficiently.
